mapper.select: SELECT s.song_id AS songId, s.title AS songTitle, s.song_path AS songPath, s.artist_id AS artistId, s.album_id AS albumId, ar.name AS artistName, a.title AS albumTitle, ( SELECT LISTAGG(g.name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY g.name) FROM song_genre_tbl sg JOIN genres_tbl g ON sg.genre_id = g.genre_id WHERE sg.song_id = s.song_id ) AS genreName, ar.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, a.cover_image_url AS coverImageUrl, a.release_date AS releaseDate FROM songs_tbl s JOIN albums_tbl a ON s.album_id = a.album_id JOIN artists_tbl ar ON s.artist_id = ar.artist_id ORDER BY s.song_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO songs_tbl ( album_id, artist_id, title, song_path, detail, lyrics ) VALUES ( #{albumId}, #{artistId}, #{songTitle}, #{songPath}, #{detail}, #{lyrics} )
